title: andryala integrifolia
intro: Andryala integrifolia is a perennial plant species belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae), native to the mountainous regions of the Mediterranean. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory qualities, which can help in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Andryala integrifolia include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and combat microbial infections. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, often used in traditional medicine for its therapeutic properties.
